title: Smoky Moroccan Chicken Tagine
description: A hearty North African-inspired stew made with smoky chicken, aromatic spices, and nutritious couscous. Perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the paprika, spice blend, doenjang, and broth. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 30-40 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Fluff the couscous with a fork and stir in the chopped parsley.
Serve the chicken and sauce over the couscous.
Garnish with additional parsley, if desired.
